title: TTT Verification Note v1.1 — Platonic Solids Supplement: Machine Verification of Center-Zero, Dual R/r Sharing, and Golden-Ratio Bipartition
description: Machine verification (Python/sympy, exact symbolic arithmetic) of three families of geometric facts about the five Platonic solids, as structural anchors for the Hyperbolic-Zero / Tri-Tetra Theory (TTT) fusion framework: (1) vertex-vector sum is exactly zero for all five solids (center-is-zero rule); (2) dual pairs share the circumradius-to-inradius ratio R/r exactly, and R/r decreases monotonically toward 1 (the sphere) along the vertex-count generation sequence 4 → 6/8 → 12/20; (3) the five solids are exactly bipartitioned into a φ-free group (4, 6, 8 vertices; all-rational coordinates) and a golden-ratio group (12, 20 vertices; φ exactly embedded). All Section-A results are classified [A] (machine-verified) under the author's proof-strength classification; interpretive readings are segregated as [C] working hypotheses. Supplement to TTT v2.0 (10.5281/zenodo.19704117) and TTT_Verification_Note_v1.0.

creators.name: Kawakami, Naoyuki
creators.affiliation: Team Shiojiri / Cooperate Craft Wine Makers

notes: Reproduction: pip install sympy; python3 verify_platonic.py — all assertions pass, exit code 0. Code license: MIT.
